subcodes.title: Ziyarat for Hadrat-i-Quddus
subcodes.first_line: O pure Essence, ornament of most holy and radiant camphor, that hath risen and shone forth, then gleamed and flashed in brilliance... upon thee, O Light of Bahá, Remembrance of Creation, Mystery of Decree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. جوهر مجرد طرز کافور اطهر اطهر انور الذی طلع و اشرق ثم لمع و ابرق ... علیک یا نورالبهاء و ذکر الانشاء و سر القضاء
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
